notes: pass must be returned to library; overdue fine $3/day; $3 per person admission
raw: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced general admission for up to 2 adults and 3 children at $3 per person. Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
